order.quickTemplatePlainText:
Hello SHREE GANESH COLLECTION,

I want to order:
- Item: <item name>
- Category: <category>
- Size: <size>
- Quantity: <qty>

Please confirm availability and price.
Thank you!

about.text: SHREE GANESH COLLECTION is your one-stop store for ready-made clothing for all genders and ages — casual wear, formal wear, sports wear, undergarments, traditional wear, festival-specific outfits, school uniforms, jerseys, and caps. We also support bulk orders for schools, teams, events, and institutions.
